LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS --DEFENDANTS K 9 PLAYTIME, INC., MARC PEARL AND RICKY LIMON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 4 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLEAD LOSS OF MONEY OR PROPERTY WITHIN THE MEANING OF BUSINESS & PROFESSION CODE 17204 AND IS NOT ENTITLED TO RESTITUTION OR THE INJUNCTIVE RELIEF SOUGHT. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

DISCOVERY 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANTS K9 PLAYTIME, INC., MARC PEARL AND RICKY LIMON'S AMENDED MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE A SUBSTANTIVE RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORY 4.1 AND EXERCISE DILIGENCE IN RESPONDING TO FORM INTERROGATORY 6.4(D). PLAINTIFF MUST PAY DEFENDANT SANCTIONS WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)

Off Calendar Nov-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. YULIYA MAGOMEDOV OF THE LAW OFFICES OF SANFORD M. CIPINKO,
TEL. NO. 693-9905 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RICHARD OZOWSKI, TEL. NO. 248-5315 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANTS K9 PLAYTIME, INC., MARC PEARL and RICKY LIMON's Amended Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories (set one) is Granted in part. Plaintiff must provide a substantive response to form interrogatory 4.1 and exercise diligence in responding to form interrogatory 6.4(d). Plaintiff must pay Defendant sanctions within fifteen days in the amount of $500.00. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Richard Ozowski, Esq. of Maranga Morgenstern, 415-248-5315 for defendant and moving party K9 Playtime, Inc.
Jeremy Cloyd, Esq. of Law Offices of Sanford Cipinko, 415-693-9904 for plaintiff and opposing party Donald McCrum

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court MODIFIED its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANTs K 9 PLAYTIME, INCORPORATED MARC PEARL AND RICKY LIMON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 4; DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(c). Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Richard Ozowski, Esq. of Maranga Morgenstern, 415-248-5315 for defendants and moving parties K 9 PLAYTIME, INC., MARC PEARL AND RICKY LIMON
Jeremy Cloyd, Esq. of Law Offices of Sanford Cipinko, 415-693-9904 for plaintiff and opposing party Donald McCrum

RULING:
ARGUED and The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANTS K 9 PLAYTIME, INC., MARC PEARL AND RICKY LIMON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 4 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLEAD LOSS OF MONEY OR PROPERTY WITHIN THE MEANING OF BUSINESS & PROFESSION CODE 17204 AND IS NOT ENTITLED TO RESTITUTION OR THE INJUNCTIVE RELIEF SOUGHT. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(c). Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
